meaning: n.草率赶出来的作品,罢工
examples: Remember we make a quicky payout in 48 hours!
The crowd quicky melted away when the storm broke.
Boca played a very good match, defending with order and attacking quicky.
Indian politicians should shed their inhibitions to engage with people informally and quicky.
Wicket-keeper Paul Nixon bowled what was to be the only three balls of Warwickshire's innings, Powell finishing the job quicky.
